# WP Plugin Foundation Support

Welcome to the WP Plugin Foundation project. We appreciate your interest and contributions.

* To report a bug, please [open an issue](https://github.com/shervElmi/wp-plugin-foundation/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml).

* To request a feature, please [open an issue](https://github.com/shervElmi/wp-plugin-foundation/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml).

* For usage questions, please start a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/shervElmi/wp-plugin-foundation/discussions).

* To report a security vulnerability, please see [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/shervElmi/wp-plugin-foundation/blob/main/SECURITY.md).
